metadata.description: Named public-source mini-grid, captive off-grid, and public-institution solar facilities with technology, status, capacity, and coordinate precision.
metadata.source: Nigeria SE4ALL Open Data Portal; REA/NEP/DARES; ECREEE; NEMSA; institutional sources
metadata.license: Mixed public-source terms; review each record and source
metadata.quality_note: 80 catalogued records: 66 SE4ALL source sites plus 14 official-source additions. Coordinates range from exact site to campus/community centroids. This is not a complete operating registry; zero catalogued records never means zero assets.
metadata.label: Catalogued Off-grid Sites

properties.developer: Ajima Farms & General Enterprises Nig. LTD
properties.owner_operator: Ajima Farms & General Enterprises Nig. LTD

properties.program_name: GVE;Akwa Ibom Govt; REA-REF, All On, ElectriFI

properties.asset_name: Nnamdi Azikiwe University Awka solar-hybrid plant
properties.coordinate_source: OpenStreetMap university centroid; facility position within campus not identified
properties.source_name: REA Energizing Education Programme sustainability release
properties.notes: REA page spells Awka as Akwa and lists 4.4 MW; current operating performance requires verification.
properties._label: Nnamdi Azikiwe University Awka solar-hybrid plant

properties.asset_name: Abubakar Tafawa Balewa University solar-hybrid plant
properties.coordinate_source: Published Gubi Campus coordinate; facility position within campus not identified
properties.source_name: REA Energizing Education Programme sustainability release
properties.notes: REA lists 1.1 MW and states that seven Phase I solar-hybrid sites were commissioned; current operating performance requires verification.
properties._label: Abubakar Tafawa Balewa University solar-hybrid plant

properties.asset_name: Joseph Sarwuan Tarka University Makurdi solar-hybrid plant
properties.source_name: REA Energizing Education Programme sustainability release
properties.notes: REA source uses the former name Federal University of Agriculture Makurdi and lists 8.3 MW; current operating performance requires verification.
properties._label: Joseph Sarwuan Tarka University Makurdi solar-hybrid plant

properties.program_name: US NGO Solar Electric Light Fund -SELF

properties.source_name: REA delivers 100 kWp mini-grid in Damau Village
properties.notes: Commissioned January 2026; source says the system was already powering households, businesses, public infrastructure and a borehole. The 2,500 figure is residents impacted, stored in customers_served only as a broad beneficiary count.

properties.asset_name: Bayero University Chemical and Petroleum Engineering off-grid solar facility
properties.community: New Campus Department of Chemical and Petroleum Engineering
properties.coordinate_source: OpenStreetMap university centroid; department installation position not identified
properties.source_name: ECREEE inauguration of Bayero University solar PV installation
properties.notes: Separate 79 kWp PV / 58 kW inverter / 60 kWh battery installation inaugurated 31 May 2024.
properties._label: Bayero University Chemical and Petroleum Engineering off-grid solar facility

properties.asset_name: Bayero University Kano EEP solar-hybrid plant
properties.coordinate_source: OpenStreetMap university centroid; facility position within campus not identified
properties.source_name: Bayero University Kano solar upgrade announcement
properties.notes: Commissioned as a 7.1 MW EEP project in 2019. BUK reported in November 2025 that the existing 3.5 MW infrastructure had gone down and a rehabilitation/upgrade to 6 MW had commenced; 6 MW is the upgrade target, not verified operating capacity.
properties._label: Bayero University Kano EEP solar-hybrid plant

properties.notes: REA's June 2026 release describes a recently commissioned 704 kW system in Offa serving over 3,000 customers. Coordinate is the Offa town centroid, not a verified plant parcel.

properties.owner_operator: A4&T Power Solutions Limited / electricity distribution partner
properties.source_name: REA commissions 505 kWp interconnected solar mini-grid in Epe
properties.notes: Commissioned 24 June 2026 to serve five communities. Coordinate represents Eredo community, not a verified plant parcel.

REA reports stable electricity and more than 7,000 connections. Capacity and coordinate come from the NEMSA inspection record: https://nemsa.gov.ng/admin-request-for-inspection-rea-solar-mini-grid/entry/1511981/.
